---
layout: cv
title: Tyler Wright's Resume
---

# Tyler Wright
Computer Science Senior | Automation, AI Tools & Business Workflow Systems

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:tylerwright200012@gmail.com">tylerwright200012@gmail.com</a>
| (916) 247-1251
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tyler-wright-9a8344b9/">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

---

## Summary
Computer Science senior at BYU-Idaho with hands-on experience building automation systems, AI-assisted workflows, and data processing tools for real business problems. Strong background in Python, machine learning concepts, OCR, APIs, and process improvement. Comfortable translating business needs into technical solutions, testing systems with real-world data, and improving workflows for small-business operations.

---

## Education

`2023 – Present`  
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__, Rexburg, ID  
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science  

`2018 – 2022`  
__Los Medanos College__, Pittsburg, CA  
Associate of Science in Electrical Technology (ETEC)

---

## Projects

### Automated Purchase Order Document Routing System (Senior Project)
- Designed and implemented an end-to-end automation system for processing scanned purchase order PDFs in a real automotive repair business
- Built a multi-stage Python pipeline for PDF conversion, OCR processing, text extraction, document classification, and Google Drive routing
- Used Tesseract OCR, Poppler/PDF2Image, regex, and spatial text analysis to identify purchase order numbers from image-based documents
- Developed rule-based classification logic for normal purchase orders, returns, no-PO documents, and manual review cases
- Integrated the Google Drive API to route documents into structured destination folders based on classification results
- Added logging, batch processing, and run-level summaries to support monitoring, testing, and reliability
- Evaluated machine learning as an enhancement for predicting whether documents should be routed to manual review

### Machine Learning Model Development & Evaluation
- Built and evaluated machine learning models including Convolutional Neural Networks, Recurrent Neural Networks, and Gradient Boosted models
- Applied preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation across multiple datasets
- Used metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1 score, ROC-AUC, and confusion matrices to compare model performance
- Analyzed model strengths, limitations, and common risks such as overfitting and data leakage
- Created clear summaries of model performance for decision-making and project reporting

### Tetris Clone (Individual Project)
- Built a fully functional Tetris game in Rust while learning the language independently
- Designed modular game components for movement, collision detection, scoring, and board state management
- Applied object-oriented and structured programming principles to produce clean, maintainable code

---

## Work Experience

`Pocatello, ID`  
__Family Auto Care__  
- Identified business workflow problems and developed technical solutions to reduce repetitive manual work
- Built and tested internal automation tools for document handling, file organization, and operational efficiency
- Worked directly with real business users to understand requirements, test edge cases, and improve system usability
- Supported process improvement efforts by combining technical development with practical shop operations knowledge
- Assisted with daily business operations, giving a strong understanding of how technology affects customer service, productivity, and staff workload

`Pittsburg, CA`  
__Deli Employee__, TOGO's  
- Worked collaboratively in a fast-paced customer service environment
- Managed customer orders, restocking, and daily operational tasks efficiently
- Developed communication, reliability, and time-management skills

---

## Technical Skills

**Languages:** Python, JavaScript, C++, Java, Rust, Erlang, C#  
**Automation & AI Tools:** OCR, Tesseract, PDF2Image, rule-based classification, machine learning workflows  
**Data & ML:** scikit-learn, pandas, NumPy, model evaluation, feature preprocessing, confusion matrices  
**APIs & Integrations:** Google Drive API, file routing automation, batch processing  
**Development Tools:** Git, VS Code, IntelliJ IDEA, command-line workflows  
**Business/Workflow Skills:** Process improvement, requirements gathering, documentation, testing, troubleshooting

---

## Volunteer Experience

`2020 – 2022`  
__Missionary__, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Las Vegas, NV  
- Studied and communicated in Japanese daily
- Conducted planning sessions and submitted weekly reports
- Developed strong communication, discipline, leadership, and problem-solving skills
